---
title: "Report Tables"
output: html_document
---

# Table Templates

## Document Types

| Document Type | Count | Percentage |
|--------------|-------|------------|
| Article | | |
| Review | | |
| Conference Paper | | |

## Top Authors

| Rank | Author | Articles | Citations |
|------|--------|----------|-----------|
| 1 | | | |
| 2 | | | |
| 3 | | | |

## Top Sources

| Rank | Source | Articles | Citations |
|------|--------|----------|-----------|
| 1 | | | |
| 2 | | | |
| 3 | | | |
